summary: Oil Premium Register Feature - Iteration 193 PASSED. All 12 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Rice Bran sub-tabs (Sales Register / Oil Premium) visible, Oil Premium form with sale lookup, bran type selector, real-time premium calculation preview working, Voucher No column visible in By-Product Sale Register table.
seed_data_creation: None - test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Oil Premium Register feature verified. Key components: (1) Backend routes in /app/backend/routes/oil_premium.py with CRUD + lookup endpoints. (2) Frontend OilPremiumRegister.jsx component with form, calculation preview, and table. (3) Rice Bran sub-tabs in Vouchers.jsx (branSubTab state). (4) Voucher No field added to ByProductSaleRegister.jsx. Standard Oil% values: Raw=22%, Boiled=25%. Premium formula: Rate * (Actual% - Standard%) * Qty / Standard%.
